chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 704 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 01-12-2021 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Hosh Muhammad Shar, Divisional Forest Officer, Afforestation Division, Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through this Petition, the Petitioners seek upgradation of their posts. It appears that the Petitioners’ case for upgradation of their posts has been forwarded by the Secretary, Forest & Wildlife Department; whereas, comments filed in 2018 by the Additional Finance Secretary state that no such reference was ever furnished. It appears that such reference has been sent in 2020; therefore, we while disposing of this Petition direct the competent authority to consider the request of the Petitioners in the light of reference of Secretary, Forest & Wildlife Department in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
